code: import{useEffect,useMemo,useState}from'react';import{fetchDonors}from'../api/donors.api';import DonorCard from'../components/cards/DonorCard';import Loader from'../components/common/Loader';import{useToast}from'../components/common/ToastProvider';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const sampleDonors=[{id:1,name:'Rahul Verma',bloodGroup:'O+',city:'Hyderabad',phone:'98XXXX1234',available:true},{id:2,name:'Sneha Nair',bloodGroup:'A+',city:'Hyderabad',phone:'98XXXX1235',available:true},{id:3,name:'Ajay Kumar',bloodGroup:'B-',city:'Secunderabad',phone:'98XXXX1236',available:false},{id:4,name:'Kiran Das',bloodGroup:'AB+',city:'Hyderabad',phone:'98XXXX1237',available:true}];const bloodGroups=['ALL','A+','A-','B+','B-','AB+','AB-','O+','O-'];function DonorSearch(){const[items,setItems]=useState([]);const[loading,setLoading]=useState(true);const[bloodGroup,setBloodGroup]=useState('ALL');const[location,setLocation]=useState('');const{pushToast}=useToast();const loadDonors=async()=>{try{setLoading(true);const data=await fetchDonors();setItems(data.length?data:sampleDonors);}catch(_unused){setItems(sampleDonors);pushToast('Live donor list unavailable. Showing demo data.','warning');}finally{setLoading(false);}};useEffect(()=>{loadDonors();},[]);const filtered=useMemo(()=>{return items.filter(d=>bloodGroup==='ALL'||d.bloodGroup===bloodGroup).filter(d=>!location||(d.city||'').toLowerCase().includes(location.toLowerCase()));},[items,bloodGroup,location]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"container py-4",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{className:"mb-3",children:"Blood Donor Search"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"card card-soft p-3 mb-3",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"row g-2",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"col-md-4",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("label",{className:"form-label mb-1",children:"Blood Group"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("select",{className:"form-select",value:bloodGroup,onChange:e=>setBloodGroup(e.target.value),"aria-label":"Filter donor by blood group",children:bloodGroups.map(group=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("option",{value:group,children:group},group))})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"col-md-4",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("label",{className:"form-label mb-1",children:"Location"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{className:"form-control",placeholder:"City",value:location,onChange:e=>setLocation(e.target.value),"aria-label":"Filter donor by location"})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"col-md-4 d-grid align-items-end",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"btn btn-danger mt-md-4",onClick:loadDonors,children:"Refresh"})})]})}),loading&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Loader,{label:"Loading donors..."}),!loading&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"row g-3",children:[filtered.map(donor=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"col-12 col-md-6 col-lg-4",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(DonorCard,{donor:donor,onRequest:()=>pushToast("Request sent to ".concat(donor.name,"."),'success')})},donor.id)),!filtered.length&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"text-muted",children:"No donors found for selected filters."})]})]});}export default DonorSearch;
